actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (fileID 1648876975, guid 22172de818174a8b99ab08c2d6c3f0b2) is the Reset script attached to Reset Plane, configured with StartLocation (9.47, -6.6, -5.84). It handles OnCollisionEnter(Collision) and resets colliding object's position when the colliding GameObject tag is 'XRRig'. MeshCollider (fileID 1648876976) on Reset Plane is convex and m_IsTrigger=1. To actually invoke OnCollisionEnter, a non-trigger collision is required with at least one Rigidbody in the pair. Ensure a Rigidbody object tagged 'XRRig' collides with Reset Plane, or temporarily disable isTrigger on the MeshCollider for the test. Expected: coll.transform.position is set to StartLocation.

MonoBehaviour (fileID 1648876975, guid 22172de818174a8b99ab08c2d6c3f0b2) is the Reset script attached to Reset Plane, configured with StartLocation (9.47, -6.6, -5.84). It handles OnCollisionEnter(Collision) and resets colliding object's position when the colliding GameObject tag is 'Weapon'. MeshCollider (fileID 1648876976) on Reset Plane is convex and m_IsTrigger=1. To actually invoke OnCollisionEnter, a non-trigger collision is required with at least one Rigidbody in the pair. Ensure a Rigidbody object tagged 'Weapon' collides with Reset Plane, or temporarily disable isTrigger on the MeshCollider for the test. Expected: coll.transform.position is set to StartLocation.
